    S

    setAnneeNaissance(int) - Method in class models.Usager
    Set the year of birth of the user.
    setAuteur(Auteur) - Method in class models.Livre
    Set the author of the book.
    setDateEmprunt(Date) - Method in class models.Pret
    Set the date when the book was borrowed.
    setDateRetourEffective(LocalDate) - Method in class models.Pret
    Set the actual return date of the book.
    setDureeEmprunt(int) - Method in class models.Pret
    Set the duration of the loan in days.
    setGenre(Genre) - Method in class models.Livre
    Set the genre of the book.
    setId(int) - Method in class models.Pret
    Set the unique identifier of the loan.
    setLivre(Livre) - Method in class models.Pret
    Set the book being borrowed.
    setNbExamplaires(int) - Method in class models.Livre
    Set the number of copies available for the book.
    setNbPages(int) - Method in class models.Livre
    Set the number of pages in the book.
    setNom(String) - Method in class models.Auteur
    Set the last name of the author.
    setNom(String) - Method in class models.Genre
    Set the name of the genre.
    setNom(String) - Method in class models.Usager
    Set the last name of the user.
    setPrenom(String) - Method in class models.Auteur
    Set the first name of the author.
    setPrenom(String) - Method in class models.Usager
    Set the first name of the user.
    setTarifReduit(boolean) - Method in class models.Usager
    Set the reduced rate status of the user.
    setTitre(String) - Method in class models.Livre
    Set the title of the book.
    setUsager(Usager) - Method in class models.Pret
    Set the user who borrowed the book.
    showErrorMessage(String, String) - Method in class ui.gui.forms.BaseFormFrame
    Displays an error message in a dialog.
    showInfoMessage(String, String) - Method in class ui.gui.forms.BaseFormFrame
    Displays an information message in a dialog.
    showValidationError(String) - Method in class ui.gui.forms.BaseFormFrame
    Displays a validation error message in a dialog.
    shutdown() - Method in class utils.LogManager
    Close the log file when the application shuts down.
    stringToValue(String) - Method in class ui.gui.components.formatters.DateLabelFormatter
    Convert the given string into an Object representing a date.
